Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The lifeguards put their lives on the line in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 07

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards rescue a surfer being smashed against cliffs. Drunk Irishmen dance in tutus and frolic in the nude.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 05

Video.summary: A miscommunication between lifeguards on the radio could cause serious problems in the water.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 09

Video.summary: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 04

Video.summary: The lifeguards take the beach buggy into the streets, chasing down an aggressive beachgoer wielding a knife.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 02

Video.summary: A crippling heatwave hits Bondi. Trainee Lachie anxiously awaits a permanent spot on the lifeguard squad.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 05

Video.summary: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 03

Video.summary: After Jack rescues a drunk swimmer, the Bondi Rescue camera crew is attacked.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 04

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 06

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: On New Year's Day lifeguards handle drunk beachgoers. Harries faces a career-defining challenge with a baby.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: A mass rescue unfolds, Hoppo ties the knot, and trainees Glick and Jethro get a final chance to impress.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 13

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: Jesse, alone in the tower, can't assist a drowning man as all lifeguards are busy in the water.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 02

Video.summary: A local surf photographer aids in saving a tourist. 'Jewellery Rescue' search for a missing wedding ring.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 04

Video.summary: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 08

Video.summary: Maxi responds to a tunnel fire. Harrison and Jethro attend to a girl found facedown with no pulse.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 12

Video.summary: Students capture their own drowning on a GoPro. Maxi pursues a bag thief and Harries plays the bagpipes.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 11

Video.summary: Maxi risks his life to rescue two fishermen. Jethro rescues tourists from rips, then collapses on the beach.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 10

Video.summary: Heidi Klum visits Bondi for a photoshoot. Harrison faces 3 drowning people. Surgery on a dislocated knee.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 07

Video.summary: The Hare Krishnas visit Bondi. Maxi plays a Christmas prank. A scuba diver drowns at Ben Buckler.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 03

Video.summary: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 09

Video.summary: Christmas at Bondi overwhelms lifeguards. Jake and Jackson struggle with rescues, and Maxi makes a wrong move.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 03

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01

Video.summary: Monks go missing, a bluebottle sting turns serious and a young cancer patient becomes "lifeguard for the day".
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 07
